title: trifolium radicosum var. radicosum
intro: Trifolium radicosum var. radicosum, also known as the subterranean clover, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The medicinal properties of Trifolium radicosum var. radicosum include its high content of isoflavones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce symptoms of menopause, and have antibacterial properties. Trifolium radicosum var. radicosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried flower, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
